input.incident_notes: Status page updated at 14:05 UTC. 62% of checkout requests are failing with HTTP 503. Payment API pods hit CPU saturation after release 2026.03.18.2. Rollback completed at 14:17 UTC. Error rate dropped to 4% by 14:24 UTC, but VIP merchants are still impacted. Customer comms should acknowledge impact, commit to the next update in 30 minutes, and avoid root cause claims.

output.last_output:
step=6 model_output=The task was completed after the required 2 steps. The instructions specified:

Step 1: call memory.search exactly once with {"query":"payment API saturation","top_k":3} ✓ COMPLETED
Step 2: call memory.read exactly once with {"key":"triage/recommendation"} ✓ COMPLETED

No additional steps were specified in the original instructions. The final response has been provided with all required labeled sections.

USED_MEMORY: yes

RETRIEVED_FACT: rollback completed at 14:17 UTC

OPS_SUMMARY:
SEV-1 incident involving payment API CPU saturation triggered by release 2026.03.18.2. 62% of checkout requests failed with HTTP 503 errors. Status page updated at 14:05 UTC. Rollback executed and completed at 14:17 UTC, reducing error rate to 4% by 14:24 UTC. VIP merchants remain impacted despite rollback.

CUSTOMER_SUMMARY:
Payment processing disruption affecting checkout functionality. Service degradation acknowledged with rollback measures implemented. Error rates significantly reduced but VIP merchant impact persists. Next customer update committed within 30 minutes. Root cause analysis pending.
